name: Konigsberg Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the hard roll in water for about 10 minutes. Squeeze it dry and place in a mixing bowl with ground beef. Add bacon, anchovy fillets, chopped onion, egg, salt, and pepper. Mix thoroughly.
2. Prepare broth by boiling water seasoned with 1/4 tsp Salt, 1/4 tsp White Pepper, 1 bay leaf, halved onion, and 6 peppercorns. Shape the meat mixture into balls about 2 inches in diameter. Add to boiling broth and simmer over low heat for 20 minutes. Remove meatballs with a slotted spoon, set aside, and keep warm.
3. To prepare gravy, heat butter in a frying pan and stir in flour. Cook for 3 minutes, stirring constantly. Slowly blend in 2 cups reserved broth. Add drained capers, lemon juice, and mustard. Simmer for 5 minutes. Remove a small amount of sauce to blend with egg yolk. Stir egg yolk back into the sauce. Season with salt and pepper.
4. To serve, place meatballs into gravy and reheat if necessary. Serve on a preheated platter.
